## Production Considerations

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Production considerations: this brief supports evaluation and existing workflow integration planning. It does not replace deployment-specific authentication, signing, infrastructure, or operational review.

## Claims Boundary

> [!NOTE]
> Claims boundary: TrustSignal public briefs describe the integrity layer, signed verification receipts, verification signals, verifiable provenance, and later verification. They do not expose proof internals, model outputs, signer infrastructure specifics, internal service topology, or unsupported legal/compliance claims.
